---
name: Proposed canon change (requires scientific review)
about: Propose a change to WFF scientific or canonical content
title: "[Canon change] "
labels: ["proposed-canon-change", "needs-scientific-review"]
---

> ⚠️ **Proposed canon changes require explicit human scientific review.**
>
> - Discussion in this issue is **not** canon and does not modify it.
> - **Do not insert new scientific claims into canon through an issue alone.**
>   Any change to `canon/` or `modules/` requires a reviewed pull request with
>   explicit human scientific approval.
> - Placeholders and open questions are not settled science and must not be
>   treated as resolved here.

## Affected concept

<!-- The WFF concept, term, metric, or relationship involved. -->

## Affected files

<!-- File paths under canon/, modules/, glossary/, etc. -->

## Proposed change

<!-- Describe the change as precisely as possible. -->

## Scientific rationale

<!-- The reasoning that supports the change. -->

## Sources

<!-- Citations supporting the change. Source documents are evidence inputs,
     not automatically canon. Do not paste full source documents. -->

## Uncertainty

<!-- What is uncertain, contested, or provisional about this proposal? -->

## Impact on the WFF analytical chain

<!-- Does this affect the WFF chain levels (Circumstances → Biological
     Consequences → Affective Experiences → Welfare Metrics), module
     boundaries, intensity categories, welfare indicators, or welfare
     metrics? Explain. -->
